fields.label: Region group
fields.name: region_group
fields.instructions: Group countries under Africa now, with room for other global regions later.

fields.label: Short hub description
fields.name: region_description
fields.instructions: Answer-ready description for the country hub and schema.

fields.label: Country code or flag label
fields.name: region_flag
fields.instructions: Use a stable country code such as KE, NG, ZA, or RW.

fields.label: Region tagging guidance
fields.name: article_region_note
fields.message: Tag the country or countries this story is about or especially useful to. Leave global stories untagged. Region is cross-cutting and does not change the article URL.
